Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Cases 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC So the main flow is RA Receive Application VF Validate Form AE Assess Eligibility Then optionally there might be a loop involving RMI Request Missing Info and VF

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the part after AE is either go directly to AD or do RMI one or more times then do VF then AD This is an exclusive choice between direct path tau or loop path RMI repeated one or more times followed by VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop operator requires that A is executed first then either exit or B then A So if we put the loop after AE then A is always executed Therefore we cannot have a loop alone there because case 2 goes directly to AD without RMI or VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So we could have XOR Sequence Loop RMI tau VF tau Then after this XOR we go to AD

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets check traces Case 2 Choose right branch tau then AD correct Case 1 Choose left branch loop gives RMI then exit then VF then AD correct Case 3 Choose left branch loop gives RMI then tau then RMI then exit then VF then AD correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: First VF is in the main sequence Second VF is in the left branch of the XOR So VF can appear twice In case 2 only the first VF appears Perfect

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The overall tree is Sequence RA VF AE XOR Sequence Loop RMI tau VF tau AD SC AC
